// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
            services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.DashboardService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0_m0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>>();
                var s0_m1 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
                var s0_m2 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>();
                var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.DashboardService();
                s0.Initialize(s0_m0, s0_m1, s0_m2);
                return s0;
            });
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Product>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Product>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
